nasb.text: It was planted in good soil beside abundant waters, that it might yield branches and bear fruit and become a splendid vine.” ’

esv.text: It had been planted on good soil by abundant waters, that it might produce branches and bear fruit and become a noble vine.

cnv.text: 其實，這樹早已栽種在肥沃的地土、水流的旁邊，可以長枝子、結果子，成為佳美的葡萄樹。’

ccb.text: 但这树已栽在水源丰沛的沃土里，可以长得枝繁叶茂，成为结实累累的好葡萄树。’
